allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Content app.js | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; \(Get-Content content.js | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; \(Get-Content styles.css | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines; \(Get-Content service-worker.js | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
PowerShell(git status; Get-ChildItem -Force | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object Name, Length | Sort-Object Length -Descending)

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(\(Resolve-Path sporlab-netlify.zip\)\); $zip.Entries | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object FullName; $zip.Dispose\(\))
PowerShell(git log --oneline -15 && \(Get-ChildItem | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String\))

PowerShell($tmp = "$env:TEMP\\sporlab-zip-inspect"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive sporlab-netlify.zip -DestinationPath $tmp; Get-ChildItem -Recurse $tmp | Select-Object @{n="Path";e={$_.FullName.Replace\($tmp+'\\',''\)}}, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp)
Bash(powershell -Command "Compress-Archive -Path index.html, app.js, content.js, styles.css, service-worker.js, manifest.webmanifest, netlify.toml, assets -DestinationPath sporlab-netlify.zip")
Bash(git commit -m 'T7: node:test-dekning for kjernelogikken via vm-harness *)
Bash(git commit -m 'T6: @ts-check + JSDoc-typer i app.js, tsc-sjekk via jsconfig *)

PowerShell(Remove-Item sporlab-netlify.zip -Force; Compress-Archive -Path index.html, app.js, content.js, styles.css, service-worker.js, manifest.webmanifest, netlify.toml, assets -DestinationPath sporlab-netlify.zip && powershell -Command "Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(\(Resolve-Path 'sporlab-netlify.zip'\)\).Entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName }")
Bash(git commit -m 'Bygg ny deploy-zip etter T6 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Bygg ny deploy-zip etter T5 *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Redesign fase 1: Ny IA med 4 faner + handlingsknapp *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Redesign fase 2: Stegvis hurtiglogg for felt *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Redesign fase 3: Quiz integrert i Lær *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Redesign fase 4: Fagkort åpnes i detaljark *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Redesign fase 5: Opprydding, treffflater, SW v19 og ny zip *)
